layout.title: XistrYmemZ - Plan. Request. Complete.
layout.description: Collaborative planning platform. Create projects, connect with community, build businesses, and coordinate efforts globally.

home.heroSubtitle: Build, share, and grow together — ad-free, AI-free, no data selling, no algorithms, no shadowbanning, no censorship. Sign up and start creating something extraordinary with the community.
home.pulseSubtitle: What's happening right now in the cooperative
home.stepsSubtitle: Four steps to join the cooperative
home.step1Desc: Create your account and claim your cosmic identity. No barriers, no gatekeeping.
home.step2Desc: Add your bio, links, shop, school. Make yourself findable in the whitepages.
home.step3Desc: Join the network. Start projects, make requests, find collaborators.
home.step4Desc: Build reputation, earn trust, expand your reach. The coop grows with you.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to connect, create, and collaborate
home.promiseAdFreeDesc: No ads, no sponsored posts, no promoted content. Your experience is never interrupted by advertising.
home.promiseNoDataSellingDesc: Your personal data is never sold, shared, or traded to third parties. No exceptions, no loopholes.
home.promiseAiFreeDesc: No AI scraping, no AI-generated content in your feed, no training on your data. Real people only.
home.promiseNoAlgorithmsDesc: Content appears chronologically by your choices, not by engagement-maximizing algorithms.
home.promiseNoShadowbansDesc: No secret suppression of your reach. If there's an issue, you're told directly. Full transparency.
home.promiseNoCensorshipDesc: Legal content is never removed for viewpoint. The community sets its own norms through groups and forums.
home.passportSubtitle: A universal reference to search, connect, and share your whereabouts across the network
home.passportUniversalRefDesc: Your Earth Passport is your universal reference on the network. Search within, notify others of your whereabouts, and stay connected wherever you are.
home.passportReputationDesc: Earn trust badges through successful transactions, contributions, and community engagement.
home.passportLocationDesc: Show your home or traveling status, set search radius, and discover people and listings near you.
home.passportUserClassesDesc: Express your role with 14 identity classes — Healer, Builder, Explorer, Sage, and more.
home.ctaDesc: Join {count} other members on the cosmic whitepages cooperative. Create your profile, launch your first project, and start connecting with people who share your vision.
